highscore.register_info: 🎯 Register: send "registerme" on the public Primary Channel within range of mqtt.meshtastic.info.pl server
highscore.hex_bonus: 🗺️ For each visited H3 hexagon: 50 points (bonus)

what_is.title: 📖 What is meshscout.guru?
what_is.description: meshscout.guru is a game about collecting points by sending traceroute packets in the Meshtastic network. The further your signal reaches, the more points you earn!

how_to_start.title: 🎯 How to start playing?
how_to_start.register_desc: To participate in the game, you must register your Meshtastic device:
how_to_start.register_after: After registration, your device will be marked as a player and you'll be able to collect points.
how_to_start.traceroute_desc: To earn points, send traceroutes to other nodes in the network:
how_to_start.traceroute_step1: Use the traceroute function in the Meshtastic app
how_to_start.traceroute_step2: Select a target node from the list

scoring.title: 💰 Scoring System
scoring.confirmation_desc: Traceroute must be confirmed (receive a response)
scoring.gps_desc: Both devices (sender and receiver) must have GPS data
scoring.uniqueness_desc: Points for a given connection are awarded once per day
scoring.player_status_desc: You must be registered as a player (#registerme)
scoring.example2_title: 📡 Example 2: Second connection to the same node
scoring.example2_status: Status: Confirmed ✅, but already sent today

no_points.title: 🚫 When will you NOT get points?
no_points.warning_title: You will not receive points in the following cases:
no_points.no_confirmation: No confirmation: Target node did not respond to traceroute
no_points.no_gps: No GPS: Your device or the target node doesn't have GPS data
no_points.duplicates: Duplicates: You already sent a confirmed traceroute to this node today
no_points.important_note: Important: Unconfirmed traceroute is saved in the system but doesn't earn points. If you later receive confirmation, points will be awarded automatically.

h3.title: 🗺️ H3 Hexagons - Mapping System
h3.intro: Mesh Scout uses the H3 hexagon system to visualize Meshtastic network coverage on the map. This is an advanced mapping system that divides Earth's surface into hexagons.
h3.what_is_desc: H3 (Hexagonal Hierarchical Spatial Index) is a system created by Uber for precise location mapping. In Mesh Scout we use resolution 8 hexagons, where each hexagon has an area of approximately 0.46 km².
h3.how_work_title: How do hexagons work in the game?
h3.auto_tracking: Automatic tracking: Each player's GPS position is automatically assigned to the appropriate hexagon
h3.activity: Activity: The system tracks how many times a player visited a given hexagon
h3.traceroutes: Traceroutes: Traceroute connections between hexagons are recorded
h3.visualization: Visualization: On the coverage map you can see all hexagons with activity
h3.coverage_map_desc: Special coverage map (available from main menu) shows:
h3.colored_hexes: Colored hexagons: The warmer the color (yellow → orange → red), the more activity in that area
h3.connections: Traceroute connections: Green lines showing connections between hexagons (darker means more connections)
h3.statistics: Statistics: Total area covered by the network, number of active hexagons
h3.example_desc: When you send a traceroute from Warsaw to Krakow, the system:
h3.example_step1: 1. Records Warsaw's GPS position in its hexagon
h3.example_step2: 2. Records Krakow's GPS position in its hexagon
h3.example_step3: 3. Creates a connection between these two hexagons
h3.example_step4: 4. On the coverage map you'll see a line connecting these areas
h3.hex_bonus_note: Important: For the first visit to a new hexagon you receive a bonus of +50 points! Traceroute points are still awarded according to the basic rule: 1 km = 1 point.
h3.tracking1: How many unique hexagons you've visited
h3.tracking2: Which areas have the most traceroute connections
h3.tracking3: How widely the Meshtastic network spreads

connections.title: 🔀 Direct vs Multi-hop
connections.direct_desc: When your device communicates directly with the target node without intermediaries.
connections.multihop_desc: When the signal passes through other nodes before reaching the target.
connections.points_note: Points are awarded the same way regardless of connection type - what matters is the straight-line distance!

longest.title: 🎯 Longest Traceroute
longest.desc: Each player's page displays their longest confirmed traceroute. It's a great way to show your device's maximum range!
longest.all_time: Counted from all traceroutes (not just today)

rankings.title: 🏆 Rankings
rankings.desc: The system offers various player rankings:
rankings.weekly_desc: Points collected during current week (Monday - Sunday)
rankings.alltime_desc: Sum of all points since the beginning
rankings.winners_note: 🏆 Winners: On the "Winners" page you can see who won in previous days, weeks and months!

tips.title: 💡 Tips and Strategies
tips.regularity: Regularity: Send traceroutes daily to different nodes
tips.explore: Explore: Look for new, distant nodes in the network
tips.location: Location: The higher you place your antenna, the farther the signal will reach
tips.timing: Timing: Radio propagation conditions can change throughout the day
tips.multihop: Multi-hop: Use other nodes as relays to reach distant targets

check_results.title: 📊 Checking Results
check_results.player_page_title: Player page: Click on your node on the map to see:
check_results.map_viz: Visualization of connections on the map
check_results.rankings_page: Rankings page: See your position among other players

faq.title: ❓ Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Q: Can I collect points without GPS?
faq.a1: A: No, both you and the target node must have GPS data for points to be awarded.
faq.q2: Q: Why didn't I get points for a traceroute?
faq.a2_3: You haven't already sent a traceroute to this node today
faq.a2_4: You are registered as a player (#registerme)
faq.q3: Q: Can I send traceroutes to the same node multiple times?
faq.a3: A: Yes, but you'll receive points only once per day for each unique connection.
faq.q4: Q: How often are rankings updated?
faq.a4: A: Rankings are updated in real-time after each confirmed traceroute.

winners_page.title: Winners - meshscout.guru
winners_page.subtitle: History of winners from different periods

info.title: ℹ️ About Coverage Map
info.description: The map shows Meshtastic network coverage based on H3 hexagons (resolution 8, ~0.46 km²). Each hexagon represents an area where player activity has been recorded. The warmer the color (yellow → orange → red), the more activity in that area.

legend.connections_note: 💡 Click the "🔗 Show Connections" button to see lines connecting hexagons
